# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-http
  namespace: payments
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-allow-checkout
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: checkout
          namespace: checkout
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-allow-orders
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-http
  namespace: orders
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-allow-checkout
  namespace: orders
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: checkout
          namespace: checkout
---

  name: orders-allow-frontend
  namespace: orders
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend
---

  name: frontend-http
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-allow-ingress-sa
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress
          namespace: ingress
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-grpc
  namespace: payments
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-grpc-allow-orders
  namespace: payments
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders
